query: HP IQ AI lab projects products released 2025

{"query":"HP IQ AI lab projects products released 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1961,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.hp.com/us-en/newsroom/press-releases/2026/hp-introduces-hp-iq-connected-ecosystem.html","title":"HP Imagine 2026: HP Demonstrates Its Vision for a Connected, Intelligent Ecosystem Across Devices and Spaces with the Introduction of HP IQ | HP® Official Site","content":"According to the HP 2025 Work Relationship Index, access to the right tools and technology is a key enabler of the employee experience – in fact, the more frequently knowledge workers use AI, the better their relationship with work becomes.
Analyze: Helps users interact with personal files (including PDF, TXT, DOC, PPT) to get summaries and actionable insights.
"As HP IQ introduces a new intelligence layer across devices and workspaces, WXP operates above it as a trusted control plane for IT, delivering unified visibility, built-in security, seamless manageability, and proactive remediation across the device fleet,” said Manoj Leelanivas, President of HP Solutions.
HP IQ will be introduced at HP Imagine 2026, with early access starting on select HP AI PCs in Spring 2026.
New HP IQ-enabled devices are expected to begin shipping in Fall 2026, with broader availability rolling out to more products across the HP portfolio starting in 2H 2026.
HP IQ is designed to integrate with enterprise tools, including HP Workforce Experience Platform (WXP) and Microsoft Intune.
HP NearSense is planned to be supported at launch on HP Poly video systems include Studio X32, Studio X52 and Studio X72, running on future Poly VideoOS software updates."},{"url":"https://www.hp.com/us-en/newsroom/press-kits/2026/hp-imagine.html","title":"HP Imagine 2026 | HP® Official Site","content":"Introduces HP IQ, a new intelligence layer designed to orchestrate work across HP AI PCs, workplace devices, and meeting spaces through local AI and proximity-based connectivity.
Expands workflow automation through Workforce Experience Platform (WXP) enhancements and connected HP Build Workspace capabilities.
Elevates player potential for competitive play with new HyperX OMEN desktops, expanded OMEN AI game support and enhanced OMEN Gaming Hub capabilities."},{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/victordey/2026/03/24/hp-enhances-wxp-and-unveils-hp-iq-as-on-device-ai-competition-heats-up/","title":"HP Enhances WXP And Unveils HP IQ As On-Device AI Competition Heats Up","content":"At HP Imagine 2026, the company shared its enterprise AI strategy with automation-first IT operations and a new on-device intelligence layer, HP IQ, designed to reshape workplace technology (Photo by Justin Sullivan/Getty Images)"},{"url":"https://www.hp.com/us-en/newsroom/press-releases/2026/hp-reimagines-future-of-work.html","title":"HP Reimagines the Future of Work | HP® Official Site","content":"According to HP’s 2025 Work Relationship Index, only 20% of workers have a healthy relationship with work, and 22% experience monthly technology issues that disrupt focus.
To further reduce complexity across the modern workplace, HP introduced HP IQ2 bringing local, on-device intelligence and proximity-based connectivity together with enterprise manageability to unlock new levels of employee productivity and collaboration across HP AI PCs and workplace devices.
As part of HP IQ, HP introduced HP NearSense4, a new spatial intelligence that helps devices discover, connect, and collaborate, simplifying transitions between tasks and environments.
HP IQ delivery app is preloaded on select HP PCs; it will be automatically updated to the future featured HP IQ application if you have auto updates enabled in Windows or will be available for download from the Microsoft Store.
Available in Spring 2025.
15% increase in chassis volume based on dimensions of the HP Z8 Fury G6i with the standard side panel (17.5” x 8.6” x 22”) compared to the dimensions with the addition of the Max Side Panel (17.5” x 10” x 22”)."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"HP IQ AI lab projects products released 2025","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.hp.com/us-en/newsroom/press-releases/2025/hp-accelerates-ai-software-investments-to-transform-the-future-of-work.html","title":"HP Accelerates AI Software Investments to Transform the Future of Work | HP® Official Site","content":"# HP Accelerates AI Software Investments to Transform the Future of Work. \"This investment will rapidly accelerate our ability to develop a new generation of devices that seamlessly orchestrate AI requests both locally and in the cloud,\" said Tuan Tran, President of Technology and Innovation at HP. \"Humane’s AI platform Cosmos, backed by an incredible group of engineers, will help us create an intelligent ecosystem across all HP devices from AI PCs to smart printers and connected conference rooms. The acquisition brings a highly skilled group of Humane engineers, architects, and product innovators to HP’s Technology and Innovation Organization. They will form HP IQ, HP’s new AI innovation lab focused on building an intelligent ecosystem across HP’s products and services for the future of work. HP is committed to reinventing the future of work through technology, delivering experiences that empower organizations and employees to thrive in today's dynamic environment. 1. ©Copyright 2025 HP Development Company, L.P. The information contained herein is subject to change without notice.","score":0.78886026,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.builtinsf.com/company/hp-iq","title":"HP IQ San Francisco Office","content":"HP IQ (formerly Humane) is HP's new AI innovation lab focused on building an intelligent ecosystem across HP's products and services for the future of work.","score":0.52583206,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/groups/AIUGM/posts/4020109041603394","title":"HP acquires Humane Platform and team for $116M","content":"HP will make Humane's engineers and product workers the base of a new AI innovation lab called HP IQ within the tech giant, the release said.","score":0.5106191,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.hp.com/us-en/newsroom/press-releases/2026/hp-introduces-hp-iq-connected-ecosystem.html","title":"HP Imagine 2026: HP Demonstrates Its Vision for a Connected, Intelligent Ecosystem Across Devices and Spaces with the Introduction of HP IQ | HP® Official Site","content":"# HP Imagine 2026: HP Demonstrates Its Vision for a Connected, Intelligent Ecosystem Across Devices and Spaces with the Introduction of HP IQ. * HP announces HP IQ,1 a workplace intelligence layer that can coordinate experiences across HP devices through local, on-device AI capabilities and proximity-based connectivity. * HP IQ is designed to enable intelligent workflows that reduce digital friction, helping employees to stay productive and teams to collaborate. (NYSE: HPQ) outlined its vision for a connected ecosystem of intelligent devices, designed to make work more seamless across devices, spaces, and experiences. Powered by HP IQ, HP is bringing local, on-device intelligence and proximity-based connectivity together with enterprise manageability to unlock new levels of employee productivity and collaboration across select HP AI PCs and workplace devices. “HP’s vision for the future of work is a connected, intelligent ecosystem that helps work flow across devices, spaces, and the moments in between,” said Tuan Tran, President of HP’s Technology & Innovation Organization.","score":0.49509352,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.hp-iq.com/join-us/5424843004","title":"Lead AI Product Designer","content":"HP IQ is HP's new AI innovation lab, building the intelligence to empower humanity—reimagining how we work, create, and connect to shape the future of work.","score":0.47636098,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.43,"request_id":"1714a4ac-0af6-4c4b-ba21-abbf100af6ce"}
